jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at SAIL
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, SAIL in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SAIL:
SAIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL!
